tonePrompts.scientific: Phendula njengososayensi, ngezixhumanisi zocwaningo noma idatha.
tonePrompts.empathic: Phendula ngozwela, uqaphela imizwa yomunye umuntu.

billing.quotaExhaustedSub: I-bot yokuhumusha imisiwe. Sicela uthenge imizuzu eyengeziwe.
billing.lowBalanceSub: Thenga imizuzu eyengeziwe ukuze uqhubeke nengxoxo yakho.
billing.paywallNoSub: Ukuze udale igumbi, sicela ubhalisele uhlelo
billing.paywallLowBalance: Akusekho mizuzu esele ebhalansi yakho - bhalisela uhlelo noma uthenge okwengeziwe

changePwd.title: SHINTSHA iphasiwedi
changePwd.errNoPassword: Ukushintsha iphasiwedi akutholakali kule akhawunti (ukungena ngemvume ku-Google).

sip.title: Ucingo lwe-SIP
sip.subtitle: Ukusetha ama-trunk ezingcingo ezingenayo neziphumayo

incoming.heading: Amakholi e-SIP angenayo
incoming.lead: Ikheli le-SIP eliyingqayizivele lokudlulisa izingcingo zangaphandle ezivela kumhlinzeki wakho ziye ohlelweni lwe-VibeVox.
incoming.emptyHint: Dala i-SIP URI ehlukile + ukungena/iphasiwedi ukuze amakhasimende akwazi ukukushayela ucingo kunoma iyiphi ifoni, futhi i-VibeVox izohumusha ngokuzenzakalelayo izwi lakho ngesikhathi sangempela.
incoming.activeHint: Umhumushi we-Bridge ulalele igumbi. Zonke izingcingo zihunyushwa ngesikhathi sangempela.
incoming.pausedHint: Sebenzisa ukwamukela ukuze i-VibeVox iqale ukuhumusha izingcingo ezingenayo.

outbound.heading: Ucingo oluphumayo
outbound.lead: Shayela inombolo yocingo kusuka ku-interface yewebhu bese i-VibeVox izohumusha ngokuzenzakalelayo ingxoxo yakho ngesikhathi sangempela.
outbound.noTrunkHint: Gcwalisa ifomu elithi "Isiqu Esisha se-SIP" phezulu kwekhasi - i-VibeVox izosebenzisa umhlinzeki wakho we-SIP (i-Zadarma, i-OnlinePBX, njll.) kumakholi aphumayo.
outbound.configureFirst: Okokuqala, setha i-trunk ye-SIP ephumayo (ifomu elingenhla)
outbound.invalidNumber: Sicela ufake inombolo efanele ngefomethi yamazwe ngamazwe (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Indlela yokusetha
howTo.step1: Thola iziqinisekiso ze-trunk ye-SIP kumhlinzeki wakho (i-Zadarma, i-OnlinePBX, i-Asterisk).
howTo.step3: I-VibeVox izodala ngokuzenzakalelayo isiqu se-SIP esiphumayo ku-LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Kuyeza maduze: I-SIP URI engenayo yokudlulisela ucingo lwangaphandle.

tenantOnly.title: Ama-trunk e-SIP ahlelwe ezingeni lomqashi
tenantOnly.hint1: Ucingo lwe-SIP alukwazi ukulungiselelwa ngaphansi kwe-akhawunti ye-superadmin (ngaphandle kwe-UUID yomqashi).
tenantOnly.hint2: Ngena njengomsebenzisi ojwayelekile one-tenantId yakhe ukuze udale i-trunk.

sip.connected: Isiqu se-SIP silondolozwe futhi sivumelaniswe ne-LiveKit

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Ukucushwa kuzosuswa. Izingcingo eziphumayo zizoma uze udale kabusha i-trunk.
danger.deleteInboundHint: Umthetho we-trunk engenayo ye-LiveKit kanye nowokuthumela uzosuswa. Izingcingo ezingenayo ngeke zisamukelwa.
danger.reissueHint: Phinda ukhiphe ukungena ngemvume nephasiwedi yekheli le-SIP. Ulwazi oludala ngeke lusasebenza.

outbound2.rateInfo: Izindleko ngomzuzu wocingo oluphumayo zinqunywa ngumhlinzeki wakho we-SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Lesi senzo asinakuguqulwa. Uma sesisusiwe, izingcingo eziphumayo zizoma kuze kube yilapho kudalwe i-trunk entsha.
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Lesi senzo asinakuguqulwa. Umthetho we-trunk engenayo kanye nowokuthunyelwa ku-LiveKit Cloud uzosuswa.

page.title: Izilungiselelo ze-Enterprise
page.subtitle: Zonke izihlanganisi, okhiye, kanye namapharamitha e-AI e-akhawunti yakho
page.upsellBody: Lapha ungalungiselela: ukhiye we-Gemini API yomuntu siqu, i-prompt kanye nesisekelo solwazi, ukuhlanganiswa ne-Quest Flow + Telegram bot, kanye nokuxhuma ku-Chatwoot CRM.

common.savedPlaceholder: Kulondoloziwe (faka okusha ukuze kufakwe okunye esikhundleni)

apiKey.savedPlaceholder: Kulondoloziwe (faka okusha ukuze kufakwe okunye esikhundleni)

gemini.heading: Ukhiye we-API we-Google Gemini
gemini.lead: Ukhiye womuntu siqu ovela ku-AI Studio. Lokhu kuthatha indawo yokhiye womhlaba wonke wazo zonke izingcingo ze-Gemini ku-akhawunti yakho.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Kusetshenziswe esikhundleni sokwendawo yonke kuzo zonke izingcingo ze-Gemini ku-akhawunti yakho.
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Imisebenzi ye-AI izosebenzisa ukhiye owabiwe we-VibeVox (uma ulungiselelwe).

telegram.heading: I-bot ye-Telegram yezaziso
telegram.lead: Dala i-bot nge-@BotFather bese ufaka ithokheni yayo. Noma ubani othumela le bot umyalezo othi /start uzothola izaziso: amaklayenti amasha, amathegi, amaphutha okuhlanganisa. Ungabhalisela abasebenzi abaningi noma wengeze i-bot eqenjini noma esiteshini—izaziso zizothunyelwa kuwo wonke umuntu ngokuzenzakalelayo.
telegram.leadAfterStart: , izothola izaziso mayelana namakhasimende amasha, amathegi, kanye namaphutha okuhlanganisa. Ungabhalisela abasebenzi abaningi noma wengeze i-bot eqenjini noma esiteshini—wonke umuntu uzothola isaziso ngokuzenzakalelayo.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ I-Bot @{{username}} igciniwe. Ukubingelela kuthunyelwe kwababhalisile be-{{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ I-Bot @{{username}} isilondoloziwe. Noma ubani oyithumelayo imiyalezo /start uzothola izaziso.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Umlayezo uthunyelwe kubamukeli be-{{count}}. Sicela uhlole iTelegram.
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Ababhalisile nabo bazosuswa - izaziso ngeke ziphinde zifike.

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Londoloza futhi uqinisekise ukhiye we-API kuqala — ukwenziwa kwesithombe kuyawudinga.
imageModel.hint: I-Nano Banana ikhiqiza, ihlela futhi iqambe. I-Imagen ikhiqiza kusukela ekuqaleni kuphela.

prompt.heading: Amathiphu
prompt.subtitle: I-prompt kanye nesisekelo solwazi sokubhala phansi emakamelweni evidiyo kuphela
prompt.kbLabel: Isisekelo solwazi (umongo wenkampani, imibuzo evame ukubuzwa, amaqiniso)
prompt.appendNote: Ungangeza imithetho yakho - izohlanganiswa ne-prompt ezenzakalelayo.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: kuphela kokubhala phansi imiyalezo emakamelweni evidiyo
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - uma uchofoza umlayezo engxoxweni bese ukhetha ithoni
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Kusetshenziswa uma uchofoza umlayezo engxoxweni yegumbi levidiyo bese ukhetha ithoni
prompt.defaultSummary: Lokho okusetshenziswa yi-AI ngokuzenzakalelayo (uma insimu yakho ingenalutho) - chofoza ukuze ubuke
prompt.extendNoteText: ngemithetho/isitayela/amatemu abo - bazohlanganiswa ne-prompt ezenzakalelayo engenhla kanye nesisekelo solwazi.
prompt.kbHeading: Isisekelo Solwazi — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Layisha idokhumenti—ikhathalogi, imibuzo evame ukubuzwa, uhlu lwamanani, imithethonqubo, noma izinto zokusikisela. Okuqukethwe kuhlungwa kuseva (i-Word/Excel/CSV → umbhalo) futhi kuhlanganiswe yi-AI uma kubhalwa phansi imiyalezo emakamelweni evidiyo. Umkhawulo: ifayela elingu-50 MB / izinhlamvu ezingu-500,000 kudathabheyisi.
prompt.successFileUploaded: Ifayela elithi "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) lilayishiwe - izinhlamvu ze-{{kbLength}} zigciniwe.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Wonke amadokhumenti alayishiwe azonyamalala. Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Engxoxweni ye-Enterprise Room, ungagqamisa noma yimuphi umlayezo bese ucela i-AI ukuthi iwuchaze ngethoni ekhethiwe. Inkinobho
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: isebenzisa i-prompt yakho esivela ensimini engenhla.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Izimpendulo ze-AI kumakhasimende nge-Telegram bots kanye ne-Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Uma insimu ingenalutho, kusetshenziswa i-prompt ojwayelekile ye-VibeVox.
questFlow.headerLead: Ingxoxo ye-AI neklayenti ngalinye ngalinye nge-bot ye-Telegram exhunywe ku-Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Ukhiye ngamunye uyimfihlo oyifaka kubhulokhi ye-Quest Flow HTTP yochungechunge. I-VibeVox iyisebenzisela ukuhlonza i-akhawunti yakho. Ungakha okhiye abaningi bamaketanga ahlukene.
questFlow.promptLead1: Inquma INDLELA i-AI exhumana ngayo namakhasimende nge-Quest Flow: ithoni, isitayela, nokuthi yini okufanele ikhonjwe.
questFlow.promptLead3: - kuzohlanganiswa nesisekelo esiyisisekelo se-prompt kanye nolwazi.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Lokho okusetshenziswa yi-AI ngokuzenzakalelayo (uma insimu yakho ingenalutho) - chofoza ukuze ubuke
questFlow.kbLead1: Amadokhumenti – ikhathalogi yesevisi, uhlu lwamanani, Imibuzo Evame Ukubuzwa. Layisha i-TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — i-AI ngeke ibe namaqiniso enkampani; izophendula kuphela ngokusekelwe olwazini olujwayelekile. Lesi sisekelo
questFlow.kbLead3: Kusukela esigabeni esithi "Amacebo"—sokubhala phansi kwevidiyo. Umkhawulo: ifayela elingu-50 MB / izinhlamvu ezingu-500,000 kusizindalwazi.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Isisekelo solwazi lwe-Quest Flow sizosulwa. Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa.
questFlow.tagsLead: I-AI inika amakhasimende la mathegi uma ithola ukufana engxoxweni. Amathegi aboniswa ekhadini lekamelo leklayenti futhi adluliselwe ku-CRM (Isigaba 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: The key will be deleted permanently. Quest Flow will stop working through it — you will need to create a new key and replace it in the flow.

chatwoot.heading: Ukuhlanganiswa kwe-CRM (i-Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Thumela ngokuzenzakalelayo umlando wekholi namathegi ku-Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Idlulisela umlando wengxoxo kanye namathegi esidingo samakhasimende ku-Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Ithokheni Yokufinyelela Ye-ejenti (kusuka kuphrofayela → Ithokheni Yokufinyelela)
chatwoot.successSaved: Kulondoloziwe. Manje chofoza okuthi "Hlola Ukuxhumeka" ukuze uhlole.
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Ingxoxo enombhalo oyimfihlo = umlando ogcwele wengxoxo
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Kuthunyelwe uma uchofoza ngesandla okuthi "Thumela ku-CRM" engxoxweni yegumbi. Ukuthumela ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho kutholwa ithegi kuyisici esilandelayo.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa. Umbhalo kanye nemidiya enamathiselwe kuzosuswa.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Amakamelo okuxoxa ayisici se-Enterprise. Thuthukisa uhlelo lwakho esigabeni esithi "Izindleko".

lobby.title: Ukujoyina umhlangano wevidiyo
lobby.subtitle: Ucingo lwevidiyo olunokuhumusha kwe-AI ngasikhathi sinye
lobby.languageHint: Uzozwa futhi ubone imibhalo engezansi evela kumuntu okhuluma naye ngalolo limi.
lobby.shareHint: Kopisha bese uthumela kumuntu oxhumana naye ukuze ameme emhlanganweni.
lobby.audioConsent: , futhi futhi uyavuma ukuthi umsindo ucutshungulwe ukuze uhunyushwe.
lobby.roomFullMsg: Sekuvele kukhona umuntu ohlanganyelayo emhlanganweni. Xhumana nomdali womhlangano noma ucele omusha.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Isixhumanisi sesikopishiwe. Sithumele koxhumana naye ngeTelegram / WhatsApp / Email. Ungalivala ikhasi manje—isixhumanisi sihlala sisebenza.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Ukuze udale igumbi, sicela ubhalisele uhlelo
paywall.titleLowBalance: Akusekho mizuzu esele ebhalansi yakho - bhalisela uhlelo noma uthenge okwengeziwe
paywall.subtitle: Khetha uhlelo noma uthenge imizuzu eyengeziwe - khokha nge-Stripe, buyisela imali yakho ngokushesha lapha.
paywall.topupNote: Amaminithi azongezwa ebhalansini yakho ngokushesha ngemva kokukhokha.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Awunakho okubhalisele okusebenzayo. I-Plus izongezwa ekuthengeni kwakho ngo-€19/ngenyanga—imizuzu engama-60 ifakiwe ohlelweni lwe-Plus, ngakho-ke akukho mali eyengeziwe.
paywall.stripeNote: Izinkokhelo zivikelwe yi-Stripe. Amaminithi afakwa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngemva kokukhokha.

billingPage.title: Izindleko kanye nokukhokha
billingPage.subtitle: Zonke izici ze-VibeVox — khetha uhlelo olufanela ijubane lakho lomsebenzi.
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Khansela ukuvuselela okuzenzakalelayo. Okubhalisele kwakho kuzohlala kusebenza kuze kube sekupheleni kwesikhathi samanje.
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Inkokhelo elandelayo izokwenzeka ekupheleni kwesikhathi samanje.
billingPage.promoHint: Isaphulelo sizosetshenziswa ngokuzenzakalelayo uma ubhalisela uhlelo noma uthenga imizuzu eyengeziwe.
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Amaminithi adlulisiwe kusukela esikhathini esidlule. Asetshenziswa kuqala.
billingPage.topupHelp: Isilayidi sokuthenga esengeziwe. Sitholakala ngokubhalisele okusebenzayo.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Kwezingxoxo zangasese kanye nabantu abasebenza ngokuzimela
billingPage.faqA1: Imizuzu engasetshenziswanga idlulela enyangeni elandelayo yekhalenda. Iphelelwa yisikhathi ngenyanga yesithathu.
billingPage.faqQ2: Ngingakwazi yini ukukhansela okubhalisele kwami nganoma nini?
billingPage.faqA2: Yebo. Ungakhansela ku-akhawunti yakho siqu ngokuchofoza okukodwa. Isikhathi esikhokhiwe kakade sizoqhubeka kuze kube sekupheleni kwaso.
billingPage.faqA3: I-A stack ephelele: amakhadi amakhasimende anokuqashelwa okuzenzakalelayo, ukugunyazwa kweTelegram, ama-prompt enziwe ngezifiso, i-Google Calendar, ukumaka izidingo ezihlakaniphile, ukuthunyelwa kwe-CRM, ukuhlanganiswa ne-questflow.pro, kanye nethebhu ehlukile yokuphatha.
billingPage.faqA4: Noma yikuphi okuhambisana ne-RFC: I-Zadarma, i-OnlinePBX, i-Asterisk/FreePBX, njll. I-VibeVox idala i-trunk ephumayo ngokuzenzakalelayo.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 ngomzuzu. Kusukela kumaminithi angu-60 kuya emahoreni ayi-10. Kufakwa ikhredithi ngokushesha ngemva kokukhokha.
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Okubhaliselwe kuzohlala kusebenza kuze kube ngu-{{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Amaminithi entela ayatholakala kuze kube yilolu suku; kungathengwa amaminithi engeziwe.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Amaminithi ohlelo lwakho asebenza kuze kube yilolu suku; ungathenga amanye. Chofoza okuthi "Qhubeka" uma ushintsha umqondo wakho.
billingPage.languagesLead: Uhlu oluphelele lwezilimi ezisekelwa ukuhumusha ngesikhathi sangempela ngesikhathi esisodwa. Ukutholwa kolimi lomthombo okuzenzakalelayo—umhlanganyeli ngamunye ukhetha ulimi lwakhe lwendabuko.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Zama isipelingi esihlukile—isibonelo, ngesiNgisi noma ngohlamvu lwendawo. Uma ulimi lungekho nhlobo, sazise, futhi sizolufaka.

register.title: Yenza i-akhawunti
register.subtitle: Ukubhaliswa kwamahhala ku-VibeVox
register.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kumele okungenani ibe nezinhlamvu ezingu-8 ubude

forgot.title: Ukutholwa kwephasiwedi
forgot.subtitle: Faka i-imeyili yakho bese sizokuthumelela isixhumanisi sokutakula.
forgot.successHint: Hlola i-imeyili yakho ukuthi ayinayo yini i-{{email}}. Uma ungayiboni i-imeyili, hlola ifolda yakho yogaxekile.

reset.title: Iphasiwedi Entsha
reset.subtitle: Khetha iphasiwedi entsha ukuze ungene ngemvume.
reset.successHint: Manje usungakwazi ukungena ngemvume ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.
reset.invalidLink: Isixhumanisi asivumelekile noma siphelelwe yisikhathi. Cela ukusetha kabusha iphasiwedi entsha.

seo.title: I-VibeVox — Ukuhumusha kwe-AI kwesikhathi sangempela kwamakholi wevidiyo kanye ne-SIP
seo.description: I-VibeVox iyipulatifomu yokuhumusha ngezwi esebenza nge-AI esekela izilimi ezingaphezu kwe-100. Izingcingo zevidiyo, ucingo lwe-SIP, ingxoxo yamakhasimende, kanye nokuhlaziywa kwengxoxo esebenza nge-AI kuyatholakala.
seo.keywords: Ukuhumusha kwe-AI, ukuhumusha ngasikhathi sinye, izingcingo zevidiyo nokuhumusha, ucingo lwe-SIP, umhumushi wezwi

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: I-VibeVox ingumhumushi we-AI osebenza ngesikhathi esisodwa wezingcingo zezwi nezevidiyo ngezilimi ezingu-108. I-WebRTC kanye ne-SIP telephony, umsizi wezwi, kanye nokuhumusha ngesikhathi sangempela kusebenza kunoma iyiphi idivayisi.
pwaInstall.installCta: Engeza i-VibeVox esikrinini sakho sasekhaya—izingcingo ezinokuhumusha, i-SIP, kanye nomsizi we-AI ngokuthepha okukodwa. Isebenza njengohlelo lokusebenza lwendabuko.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Iya esikrinini sasekhaya - qala ngokuthepha okukodwa

partner.title: Partner program
partner.subtitle: Share your link and earn
partner.termsEmpty: Program terms are not set yet. Please contact SuperAdmin.
